response.justification: Strong software engineer with 30+ years of experience and demonstrated expertise in testing, architecture, and software craftsmanship across multiple domains. However, has critical gaps in the required C++ proficiency (2-3 years vs. 8-year minimum) and lacks deep cloud infrastructure/compute platform specialization. Background is primarily web, mobile, and backend development rather than cloud compute systems. Could be viable if organization is willing to invest in C++ ramp-up or if role has flexibility around core requirements.
strengths: Proven expertise in testing, TDD, and establishing engineering best practices across multiple organizations
Strong architectural thinking demonstrated through building large-scale distributed systems and owning complex projects like GISCollective
Full-stack capability with experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and multiple programming languages shows adaptability and breadth
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (2-3 years vs. 8-year requirement) with most background in TypeScript/JavaScript and web technologies
Limited demonstrated expertise in cloud infrastructure and compute platforms; experience is primarily in application development and microservices, not cloud architecture
No clear evidence of technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or managing large technical teams in a leadership capacity

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform and infrastructure specialization
Software design, architecture, and engineering practices
